results.rendered_html: ava-√3. hā (aor. 3. sg. avahāh [for ˚hās-t], perf. 3. sg. -jahā ind.p. -hāya) to leave, quit,  RV. i, 116, 3  and viii, 45, 37 ;  TS. ;  MBh. xiii, 6208  Pass. hīyate (fut. -hasyate,  Kāṭh. ) to be left remaining, remain behind,  MBh. iii, 11558 , ‘to remain behind’ i.e. to be excelled,  R. v, 2, 11 , (1. sg. hīye) to be abandoned,  RV. x, 34, 5  Caus. (aor. Subj. 2. sg. -jīhipas) to cause to remain behind on or to deviate from (a path abl.),  RV. iii, 53, 9.
